title: Blue Canyon Toilet Brush, Black, 36 x 41 x 43 cm
features: Add an elegant and refined touch to your bathroom with this beautiful toilet brush and holder
Quickly reaches every corner and cleans your bathroom effectively
This toilet brush never wears out or changes its shape, maintaining perfect cleaning
It offers plastic brush heads, convenient, washable and more durable than ordinary brush heads
Can be positioned neatly by the toilet for ease of use
description: Product Description A FULLY MANAGED SUPPLY CHAIN OF HOUSEHOLD RANGES Our home and bathroom accessory ranges are constantly changing to meet and adapt to design trends in; bathroom textiles, bathroom accessories, laundry and storage – providing a full homeware range to our clients. An introduction to Blue Canyon... Luxury By Design Blue Canyon are at the forefront of Bathroom Accessory and Homeware manufacturing and distribution. Having built an enviable supply chain of proven providers during the course of 30 years’ experience in the bathroom accessory industries, Blue Canyon have a global reach in manufacturing that ensures the smoothest of operations and supply. Toilet Brushes Stainless Steel Toilet Brushes Stainless steel toilet brushes in various shapes and sizes. They are a durable material and easy to clean. Blue Canyon offer the most modern/chic designs making the perfect luxury bathroom accessory. Plastic Toilet Brushes Blue Canyon plastic toilet brushes are the highest quality and finishing combinations to suit any home. A range from simple block colours to a decorative lace effect provides an attractive finish. Free Standing which can be positioned neatly by the toilet for ease of use. Design Toilet Brushes Don't want a plain toilet brush, then you might want to add a beautifully designed one to your basket instead. They are the perfect accessory to add some richness into your bathroom.
